title: Bridge Essay: Interventions to support spirituality among adults with cancer: a scoping review

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Interventions to support spirituality among adults with cancer: ascoping review.** — Support Care Cancer. PMID: 40751754. DOI: 10.1007/s00520-025-09787-x. Spirituality is acore component of holistic cancer care, yet additional support is needed to understand and implement spirituality-focused interventions in practice. The aim of this review was to identify available interventions to address spirituality among people with cancer, to explore common components, and to examine efficacy across interventions.
